test_coverage.integration: 9 integration tests (IborGuardIntegrationTest x3, CacheHitAuditEmittedTest x2, UpstreamFailureReturns503Test x4)
test_coverage.contract: pass (KafkaAuditEventPublisherContractTest x5 — Security C-2 byte-grep + reflection)

assumptions_verified.ASSUMPTION-TL-001: escalated — FIXED_DEPOSIT balance = principal+accrued interest ASSUMED per SUBDEC-001. EligibilityPolicy config flip available (balance-dashboard.eligible-types property). Verify against staging account-service during QA P1.
assumptions_verified.ASSUMPTION-TL-002: escalated — JWT scope 'accounts:read' assumed. @PreAuthorize('hasAuthority(SCOPE_accounts:read)') wired. Verify against identity-service staging during integration testing.
assumptions_verified.ASSUMPTION-TL-003: deferred to banking-qa — Resilience4j defaults (timeout 300ms / retry 2x / CB 50%) must be validated against staging account-service latency (QA P1 shift-left).
assumptions_verified.ASSUMPTION-TL-004: deferred to banking-devops — Redis cluster AES-256-GCM at-rest + maxclients headroom verification by D5. SSL enabled in application.yml (spring.data.redis.ssl.enabled=true).

security_gates.C2_contract_test: pass — KafkaAuditEventPublisherContractTest byte-grep confirms zero forbidden field keys in SUCCESS/FORBIDDEN/ERROR records. Reflection confirms 9 permitted component names only.
security_gates.C3_archunit: pass — CustomerIdSourceRule enforces: only IborCheckFilter may call request.getHeader(); CustomerIdResolver.resolve(jwt) is sole customerId source.
security_gates.C4_ssl_config: present — spring.data.redis.ssl.enabled=true in application.yml base config. application-staging.yml overrides to false for non-TLS staging Redis (DevOps to verify ASSUMPTION-TL-004 by D5).
security_gates.hexagonal_purity: confirmed — domain/ package has ZERO Spring/Kafka/Redis imports. Application layer has @Service only. All adapters in infrastructure/.

implementation_notes.redis_setex: RedisCacheRepository uses redisTemplate.opsForValue().set(key, value, Duration) exclusively — NEVER separate SET+EXPIRE
implementation_notes.redis_fail_open: CachePort.get() catches RuntimeException -> log WARN + cache_miss_reason_total{reason=REDIS_UNAVAILABLE} metric -> return Optional.empty()
implementation_notes.feature_flag: balance-dashboard.enabled=false default; BalanceDashboardDisabledController returns 501 Not Implemented when flag is off
implementation_notes.balance_type: BigDecimal in domain; @JsonSerialize(using=ToStringSerializer) on AccountViewDto.balance ensures JSON string serialization
implementation_notes.audit_publish: Async fire-and-forget via KafkaTemplate.send() .whenComplete() callback. No .get(). publish() swallows ALL exceptions (logged+metered).
implementation_notes.account_service_index: account-service had no existing customer_id index (account-service directory did not exist). Created V001+V002 migrations with CONCURRENTLY flag.
implementation_notes.avro_namespace: AuditEventRecorded stub in com.bank.compliance.audit.v2 — namespace must match Apicurio registration. Verified by KafkaAuditEventPublisherContractTest#avroMapper_packageNameMatchesApicurioNamespace.
